projects.title: Videohranitel — Official Website for a Video Surveillance Installation Company
projects.description: A corporate website for a company offering integrated solutions in security and comfort: video surveillance system installation, air conditioner setup, and electrical wiring services.

projects.title: El Solo — Personal Website of a Freelance Developer
projects.description: A multilingual portfolio and client acquisition platform embodying the 'one developer, full cycle' philosophy. The site showcases end-to-end web development, technical support, and digital marketing services — emphasizing personalized attention, transparency, and long-term partnership.

projects.title: Historical Dates is a minimalistic educational web project
projects.description: A simple and concise website presenting the key scientific and technological events of 1980-2022. The project was created simply with the idea: «We need something beautiful and interactive in a hurry».

icon.alt: The logo of the Historical Dates website
